items.title: Ugly, ugly game for the Fever. 106-92 loss to the Sparks. Fever were up 10 after ~8 minutes of play, then outscored by 26 in the last 32 minutes.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Ugly, ugly game for the Fever. 106-92 loss to the Sparks. Fever were up 10 after ~8 minutes of play, then outscored by 26 in the last 32 minutes.

Kelsey Mitchell had 29, but the Fever's defense was rough. They're 12-9 with another game tomorrow in Phoenix.

items.title: Not a good showing from the Fever, completing their season series vs LA with a 106-92 loss. Allowed 100+ pts in 7 of 9 losses.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Not a good showing from the Fever, completing their season series vs LA with a 106-92 loss. Allowed 100+ pts in 7 of 9 losses.

Boston missed her 2nd game as a pro, Clark played 16mins on a restriction, Cunningham hurt in warmups, foul trouble & turnovers (17).

Next: Thu. at PHX

items.title: This minutes restriction can't be easy on Clark — playing in short bursts, which makes it difficult to find a rhythm.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
This minutes restriction can't be easy on Clark — playing in short bursts, which makes it difficult to find a rhythm.

And she wants to play every minute. This is a long-term play so she has to abide by the medical staff's management plan to get right.

Six more games til ASB.

items.title: Three shots from nine feet and in, Fever missed all three. Fever made two of them harder than they had to. That kind of night. They're down 91-77 with 5:40 to go.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Three shots from nine feet and in, Fever missed all three. Fever made two of them harder than they had to. That kind of night. They're down 91-77 with 5:40 to go.

items.title: Kelsey Mitchell hit four 3s in the third quarter. The Fever scored 30 points. That's good.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Kelsey Mitchell hit four 3s in the third quarter. The Fever scored 30 points. That's good.

The Sparks scored 34. That's quite bad. Ugly, ugly night from the Fever, down 82-71 heading into the fourth quarter.

items.title: Rae Burrell is having herself a game. She has 20 in 26 minutes. The Sparks are leading 82-71 over the Fever as we enter the final quarter.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: Rae Burrell is having herself a game. She has 20 in 26 minutes. The Sparks are leading 82-71 over the Fever as we enter the final quarter.

items.title: Foul trouble and injuries hurting the Fever. Rotation is different as a result. I'm sure things feel different for the players.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Foul trouble and injuries hurting the Fever. Rotation is different as a result. I'm sure things feel different for the players.

But they just look so unfocused. That Rae Burrell offensive rebound for LA was a zero-effort play. Poor in many ways, down 13.

items.title: Fever really missing Aliyah Boston tonight, having trouble against the Sparks' frontcourt. LA's starting 3, 4, 5 have combined for 46 of their 66 points. Need more resistance.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever really missing Aliyah Boston tonight, having trouble against the Sparks' frontcourt. LA's starting 3, 4, 5 have combined for 46 of their 66 points. Need more resistance.

Hines-Allen, who started for Boston, is on the bench with four fouls.
